rationale: The US-Iran peace deal announcement drives market moves and oil price drops, directly relevant to US residents, but the deal is not yet signed/enacted — continuation of last cycle's baseline with no new qualitative leap beyond the Friday signing announcement.

top_events.title: US-Iran announce ceasefire/peace deal; stock markets soar, oil falls
top_events.summary: Markets surging and oil prices falling are tangible economic effects for US residents, but the deal is not yet signed — continuation of last cycle's development with no new qualitative change.

top_events.title: Trump says leader of Venezuelan Tren de Aragua gang killed in US strike
top_events.summary: Confirmation of a US strike killing the Tren de Aragua leader is a continuation of the established operation — no new qualitative development beyond last cycle's baseline.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Another US citizen detained by China on espionage charges continues the established pattern of US-China tensions — no new qualitative escalation beyond the known baseline.
